rulings.Case Title: JODIE COLLINS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, May 19, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Pneumo Abex LLC¿s motion to compel further responses to requests for admissions and request for sanctions is granted. Plaintiff is required to provide further responses to requests for admission 36 and 38-116 in 20 days. Plaintiffs¿ objections lack merit. Plaintiffs¿ substantive responses are evasive and not in keeping with the language or spirit of the request for admission procedures. Plaintiff and his counsel are required to pay sanctions of $1390 (6 hours at $225 per hour plus $40 filing fee). Plaintiff¿s position lacks substantial justification. = (220/HEK)
